name: Fastnacht's
recipeIngredient: 2 3/4 cups all-purpose flour, or more, if needed
recipeInstructions:
COATING:
Ground cinnamon
Granulated sugar
Dissolve yeast in warm water.
In the hot water, melt shortening. Add evaporated milk, sugar and salt.
Stir in lemon juice, egg and nutmeg. When lukewarm, add yeast.
Add flour, a cup at a time, beating well. Dough should not be stiff but
not thin— right when batter won't drop from spoon.
Let rise in a warm place for 1 hour. Turn onto floured surface and pat
with fingers to 1/4 inch thickness. Let stand 1/2 hour.
Mix cinnamon and sugar in small bag, to your taste. Set aside.
Cut into any shape or with a cutter 2 1/2 inches to 3 inches in diameter.
Pull so the center is thinner. Deep fat fry until golden brown. Set on
brown paper bag for a minute, to remove excess oil.
Place Fastnacht in bag with cinnamon and sugar. Shake bag until
Fastnacht is lightly coated. These are equally delicious served at any
temperature.
Yields 1 dozen.
